name: Generic Sam: build a small feature in Solomon
description: Catch-all Sam template for 'add this feature to Solomon' requests where the feature is small (single file, single PM2 process, ≤1 day of work) and explicit (Jed described what he wants).
trigger_examples: build a daily YouTube subscriber check at noon CT
wire a new tool that does X
prompt_template: Sam: build {{feature_description}}. Follow the standard build protocol — backup the file, show diff, node --check, restart the affected PM2 process, confirm online + log clean, commit + push to buildingshultz-sudo/solomon-ai. Acceptance: feature ships and Jed sees it work in Telegram (or wherever the change manifests).
escalation_conditions: feature description is vague (under 10 words and no concrete behavior)
feature would require >1 day or multiple new processes — escalate so Jed can scope it

smoke_test.trigger_message: build me a /reminders slash command in solomon that lists pending tasks

notes: This is the safety-net template for engineering asks. Below 0.85 confidence (likely common for generic build requests), it will route through Nathan first.
